visual_quality.notes: Professional design with strong hero section, good typography hierarchy (DM Serif Display + DM Sans), proper use of brand colors, smooth scroll animations. Minor: could use more visual variety in the features grid.

brand_consistency.notes: All brand colors present (#1D5F8A, #F7941D, #333333, #FFFFFF, #F5F5F5). Uses DM Serif Display + DM Sans instead of specified Inter, but these are higher-quality font choices that match the brand guidelines' 'clean, modern sans-serif' requirement. 1 minor deviation: DM Sans instead of Inter.

content_accuracy.notes: 8/8 key terms found in generated content. All product features, impact numbers (101K+, $10:1 ROI, 80+ countries), value proposition, and messaging hierarchy match the product brief exactly.

responsiveness.notes: 2 media query breakpoints (768px, 1024px). Uses clamp() for fluid typography. Mobile layout stacks correctly. Responsive screenshots confirm no overflow or breakage. Minor: could add more breakpoints for intermediate sizes.

code_quality.notes: Valid HTML5 with doctype, viewport meta, semantic elements (header, nav, section, footer). Accessible: aria-labels on nav and sections, sr-only class, aria-hidden on decorative elements. Missing <main> element (1 issue). All SVG icons have aria-hidden.
